_meta.description: Expected values for every JSON bundle key that the Pratibimb redesign edits. The validator reads each bundle from the feature branch and asserts that the key exists, the hi matches exactly (trimmed), and the en matches exactly if specified. Keys in _forbidden are keys that MUST NOT appear (e.g., renamed-away keys).

drilldown.location_section.rationale: Aligned with restore bundle — collision resolved

drilldown.executor_section.rationale: Action header when no executor assigned

drilldown.executor_section.assigned.rationale: Informational header once executor is assigned

cta.start_installation.rationale: New key — was rendering [cta.start_installation] literally; added this session

executor.install.title.rationale: New key — renamed from executor.title to avoid cross-bundle collision with restore (which uses कौन ठीक करेगा?)

drilldown.location_section.rationale: Aligned with install bundle — was स्थान, caused silent override

_forbidden_keys._description: Keys that must NOT appear in any bundle (e.g., renamed or deprecated). Validator fails if it finds them.

_known_bugs_to_fix._description: Pre-existing bugs in the bundle that the validator should flag as warnings so they don't leak into the feature PR.
